title: geranium cinereum subsp. dolomiticum
intro: Geranium cinereum subsp. dolomiticum, also known as the Dolomitic Rock Geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Geranium cinereum subsp. dolomiticum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and creams, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
